titleStmt.title: SII 15.72: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 72. (B.K. No. 196 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Banaśaṅkari temple.

The inscription bears two dates: (1) 5th regnal year of the king, Parābhava, which corresponds to 1186-87 A.D. (2) 6th regnal year of the king, Plavaṅga, corresponding to 1187-88 A.D. It is not possible to give the precise equivalents of the dates, as the details are lost.

It records, on the first date, the remission of tax on the lands of the Brāhmaṇas in the five Brahmapuris of Aṇṇigeṟe made by Daṇḍanāyaka Kēśirājayya, the Perggaḍe of Beḷvala-nāḍu, who was an officer of Ballaya-Sāhaṇi, in the presence of the Karaṇas, Trivargasamaya and the body of One Thousand. It records on the seconddate another gift made to the Brāhmaṇas of Brahmapuri by Pattaṇādhipati Haḍa vaḷa Basavayya. It describes the genealogy of the Chālukya kings and mentions Bammidēva, Liṅgadēva, Vishṇu-daṇḍanātha, Rāya-daṇḍanātha and other officers. Aṇṇigeṟe is praised as the crest jewel of the province of Eraḍaṟunūṛu. Most of the composition is in Kannaḍa, but a few Sanskrit verses are also inserted. The record is damaged and many passages are worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
tyāviṣakṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitāṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnata
śrīmadviriṁcipriyataratanu jātōtrinētrōdbhavaṁ lōkastutyaṁ sōmananā
sakaṁ vaṁśāvatāraṁ
damaged
lladēvanūrmmaḍi venesa jayalakṣmī śreya dēvatanaya
tyāsrayanātaniṁsatyāsraya kuḷavene pesaru janapa śrayadēva
ninnenaggiṟiyanappa sonu vikramāditya khiḷavasudhāta
ḷamaṁ . Ene negaḷda vikramā na tammanayyaṇa taṁganujanakhiḷā
vanijanavinutaṁ śrī jayasiṁhanṛpaṁ . Ā jayasiṁhanṛpaṁge tanūjaṁ
cāḷukyarājyabhara dhaurēyaṁ traiḷōkyamallanāhavamallaṁ .
kanāhava bhuvanaikamalla sōmēsvaranātana tammaṁ tribhuvana
vikramādityadēvaṁ . Ā tribhuvanamallana priya jña cakravartti
yādhirāja kamallanāḷdaṁ dhareyaṁ mēsvara
nātana traiḷōkyamallaṁ nūrmmaḍitailaṁ . ripubhūbhṛ
tsēnāvanadāvānaḷa śrīmatsōmēśvara dharagi
kṣatriyapavitra tribhuvanamalla sutrāmavibhava
khiḷōrvvi ntata svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārā[jādhirāja pa-]
ramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvana mallavīrasō
mēsvaradēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
tatprabaḷapradhānanadhi tpratibhānvitaṁ varaśakti samanvita nāta
dhāriṇī bhṛtprati virājitakīrttinidhi ba
mmarasaṁ nṛpamaṁtrimaṇḍana maṁtri prabhu bammidēvadaṁ
ḍādhipamaṁ rādari rathinī patimaṇḍa
na liṁgadēva daṁḍādhipa mukhyareṁba dghakīrttigaḷu . Ā daṁḍa nāthana ma
hāpradhānaṁ ba mahimōṁnati . naḷinī nāḷa doḷeṁde yalpaguṇamattunmā
dadiṁ bhrāṁtanappa sārtthāhvaya kalikalmā(lma)sa doḷoṁdadhiguṇanidhi
śrīballa sāmantanaṁ śrīdēvi sarvvātmadiṁ . ta . varayōsijjanakāmaṁ
vīryyavinayaśrīdhāma nāyamanu vyāpāra nissīmanuṁ
harapādābjalalāmanapratimanā tyēka bhūsōmaneṁdu tyāvanigīśanāgiyesadaṁ śrī
masāmantanu . Ā ballayasāhaṇige manadante yaṁtara�ru dhanadante parirakṣaru prāṇadante pa
priyarumappa beḷvalanāḍa perggaḍe daṁḍanāyakaṁ śrī kēsirājayyaṁgaḷa ne . Ēkastā
dadhikō dēvassa gaurīpatīṣṭa ssōpi phaṇipatau nidrā srīpatiḥ Ityā
bhagavatōssāni grahānugraha rmmūrttimatī
jaru . śrī viṣṇurddaṁḍanāthō nikhiḷaguṇanidhī rāyadaṁḍādhipaśca srīmannārāyaṇa mita sū
ṇi cūḍāmaṇisca . srī rāmasyānujātō mukhastasya vaṁśapra pratyēkaṁ
pravitatayasasā bhānti bhūyaḥ prabhā kara ṇānija tyāvi
syādhyāpuruṣārtthacatuṣṭayē dhīmūn ssōmanāmāparō dīkṣāda
ḷaviddharmmasriṣṭipradhānaḥ Anyastu śrīdhara pāyaṁtritō dīkṣā sarōsauhā
pracuramahimākaḷpabhūjō dvijānāṁ . Eraḍaṟunūṟunāḍiṁgaṁ śirō maṇiyene
geṟeya mahimōṁnatiyeṁtane . gēhāvaḷiyiṁ yatiprakaradiṁ ṣaṭ�arkka vidyā
dyadbudhakōṭiyiṁ śrutikathātajñadvijānīkadiṁ brajadiṁ viḷāsavanitāsandōha divi
baḍediddudaṇnegeṟe nānāramya harmmōrjjitaṁ . khyā bhāmini bhāsura
karaṁ tanmahāpattanaṁ tajjātaṁ śōbhippududyadguṇagaṇaracitānantagāvuṁḍa varggaṁ nūtā
varaviḷasadvarggamatyudgajagamākūra śrīmanmunīṁdrasthagitanutapurīvargga vantu trivarggaṁ
yaventene . śaraṇarggūrjjitasaukhyavīva samayaṁ pratyartthi varggakke ceccaradiṁ bhītiya mā
vidvajjanarggiṣṭamaṁ cirakālaṁ paripūripippa samayaṁ tāneṁdu �yātavī surabhūjōpama
yaṁ lōkaikasaṁsēvyavu . bhūdēvaśrēṇigaṁnijakarāvarjjadiṁ jīvakaṁ bhūbhridvarggēsaṁgadhikava
permeyaṁ Uddhamā dhārige vighaṭakaṁ tējadiṁ dhammakarmmōnidrarggellaṁ paḍavaḷavṛkṣābhikhya
naḥ sadācārakaḷēvarā . sadpidyānidhayō bhānti sarvvabrahmapurī dvijāḥ
ḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvara dēvavarṣada 5 neya parābhava saṁvatsa
ra byatīpātadandu srīmanmahāpradhānaṁ beḷvalanāḍa perggaḍe kēsavabhaṭṭayya daṁḍanāyaka
karaṇaṁgaḷu sahita trivarggasamayasāsirvvara saṁnidhānadalli samastaguṇa
geṟeyaydu brahmapuriya brāhmaṇarige Avare holadoḷage māḍu vokkalalli
kuḍinudeṟeymaṁ Aydu brahmapuriya bāduveya kāhaḷigaḷa kaiyalu
maṁ pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi biṭṭaru Illiṁdaṁ �leyalli harada
ḷḷiyavarāgali yāru māḍidaḍaṁ kuḍinudeṟemilla . Āṟeneya plavaṁga saṁ
radaṁdu śrīmatu paṭṭaṇādhipati haḍavaḷa basavayyaṁ tanage yayda brahmapuriya
yamaṁ tānuṁ brahmapuriyammāḍuva puṇyasamayadoḷaydu
da prakṣālanaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ dānavā
du śrīmatu kēsavabhaṭṭadaṁḍanāyakaru mahāsirivantana dēhutara kayyo
vanā brahmapuriya brāhmaṇarige dhārāpūrvvakavāgi biṭṭaru . Ī dharmma
raṇāsiyalli sūryyagrahaṇadoḷu satpātrarappa bāhmaṇarigu
yaṁ dānaṁ māḍida puṇyavahudu . Īdharmmamaṁ keḍisidātaṁge
doḷu viśiṣṭarappa kōṭi brāhmaṇarumaṁ kōṭi kapiḷagaḷumaṁ vadhiyi sida
kōṭivadhaṁ smṛtaḥ . pavitrakarabhaṁgē tu gōkōṭi pha�maśnatē . śrīmadvidyākṣētra
narappa kalidēvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyara putraṁ māttaṁḍadēvaṁ bareda
trasa ḍeya cāmōja kaṁḍaṇisida . maṁgaḷa
Digital edition of SII 15.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
